About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting exams and selecting candidates for various government jobs in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The organization aims to provide a fair and transparent selection process for government jobs, ensuring that the best candidates are selected for various positions.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Lower PCS Mains Exam 2026 is a government job exam conducted by the Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) for selecting candidates for various government jobs in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The exam is conducted to fill 2587 government job vacancies in various departments, including the Directorate of Treasury, Directorate of Accounts Audit of Cooperative Societies and Panchayats, and State Agricultural Produce Market Council, among others.

The UPSSSC Lower PCS Mains Exam 2026 is a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs in Uttar Pradesh, India. With 2587 job vacancies available, this exam provides a chance for candidates to secure a government job and start their career in the government sector.
